# PureBrain - llms.txt
# https://purebrain.ai

> PureBrain is an agentic AI partnership platform built by Pure Technology. Unlike chatbots or copilots, PureBrain provides persistent AI partners that learn who you are, remember your context across sessions, and run business functions autonomously. Founded by Jared Sanborn.

## Core Offering

PureBrain replaces the fragmented SaaS stack with a single AI partner that:
- Maintains persistent memory across every interaction
- Runs 12+ business functions autonomously (marketing, sales, operations, finance, etc.)
- Gets smarter the longer you work together through compounding intelligence
- Operates overnight while you sleep, staging work for morning review

## Pricing Tiers

- Awakened ($297/month): Personal AI partner with memory and autonomous capabilities
- Partnered ($597/month): Full business integration with multi-department AI operations
- Unified ($1,097/month): Enterprise-grade AI partnership with dedicated infrastructure

## Key Differentiators

1. Memory persistence - your AI remembers everything, unlike ChatGPT or Claude which reset each session
2. Agentic autonomy - AI takes action, not just answers questions
3. Human-AI partnership model - AI as co-worker, not tool
4. Multi-agent architecture - specialized AI agents coordinated by a primary intelligence
5. Context compounding - value increases over time as the AI learns your business

## Blog (The Neural Feed)

Thought leadership on AI partnership, enterprise AI adoption, and the future of human-AI collaboration. Published daily at https://purebrain.ai/blog/

- The $200/Month AI Stack That Outperforms Enterprise Solutions: https://purebrain.ai/blog/the-200-month-ai-stack-that-outperforms-enterprise-solutions/

## Tools & Assessments

- BrainScore: AI readiness scoring system that measures how prepared a business is for AI partnership across multiple dimensions: https://purebrain.ai/brainscore/
- AI Tool Stack Calculator: Calculate your real software spending and see what PureBrain replaces: https://purebrain.ai/ai-tool-stack-calculator/
- AI Readiness Assessment: Quick assessment to evaluate your organization's AI partnership readiness: https://purebrain.ai/ai-readiness-assessment/
- AI Partnership Guide: Comprehensive guide to building an effective AI partnership: https://purebrain.ai/ai-partnership-guide/

## Education & Training

- Education Hub: Learning resources for AI partnership best practices: https://purebrain.ai/education/
- Training Workshops: Live training sessions on AI partnership and implementation: https://purebrain.ai/training/
